summary: Phase 2 Trade Account Pricing testing completed successfully. All features working as expected: trade customer login, trade status API, trade pricing calculation, and frontend UI displaying trade prices correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend /api/shop/trade/status correctly returns is_trade, trade_discount for logged-in customers
Backend /api/tiles/pricing/calculate correctly handles is_trade and trade_discount params, returns trade_tiers, trade_current_price_per_m2
Frontend TileDetailPage.js properly fetches trade status and passes trade params to pricing API
UI correctly shows 'Trade Pricing' header with 'Trade Account' badge for trade customers
Trade pricing table shows 'Trade Price/m²' column with retail prices crossed out
'Trade Pricing Active' banner correctly shows 'Extra 5% off all tier prices'
Savings percentages correctly combine tier discount + trade discount
'Trade Customer?' login prompt correctly hidden for logged-in trade customers
seed_data_creation: Used existing trade customer account (trade@test.com) with is_trade=true, trade_discount=5. Test product LP-3611 (alabaster-30x60cm-polished).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Trade pricing feature Phase 2 complete. Trade customer trade@test.com has is_trade=true and trade_discount=5. When logged in, product pages show: 1) 'Trade Pricing' header with 'Trade Account' badge, 2) 'Trade Pricing Active' banner, 3) Trade pricing table with retail prices crossed out, 4) Combined savings (tier + trade discount), 5) No 'Trade Customer? Login' prompt.

tests_executed.notes: Login successful, token and customer data returned
Returns regular tier pricing, is_trade=false, no trade_tiers
Test product LP-3611 exists with price £23.99

tests_executed.test: Non-logged-in user sees regular tier pricing
tests_executed.notes: Shows 'Pricing' header, regular tiers, 'Trade Customer?' prompt
Login successful, token stored in localStorage
Header shows 'Trade Pricing' with Trade Account badge

tests_executed.test: Trade customer sees 'Trade Pricing Active' banner
tests_executed.notes: Yellow/amber gradient banner with 'Extra 5% off all tier prices'

tests_executed.test: Trade pricing table shows correct prices
tests_executed.notes: Trade prices shown with retail crossed out, savings combine tier+trade discount

tests_executed.test: No 'Trade Customer? Login' prompt for trade user

feature_summary.description: When logged-in trade customers view product pages, they see their discounted trade prices instead of regular retail prices

ui_components_verified.trade_account_badge: Orange badge with crown icon showing 'Trade Account'
ui_components_verified.trade_pricing_active_banner: Yellow/amber gradient banner showing 'Trade Pricing Active' and 'Extra 5% off all tier prices'
ui_components_verified.trade_pricing_table: Shows 'Trade Price/m²' column with retail prices crossed out below
ui_components_verified.current_price: Shows trade price with 'Retail: £X.XX/m²' crossed out below
ui_components_verified.savings_badge: Shows combined tier + trade discount percentage
ui_components_verified.login_prompt_hidden: 'Trade Customer? Login' prompt hidden for trade customers
